Neuroplasticity
for the People
A gentle guide through your microdosing journey
What is microdosing
Small doses,
meaningful change.
Microdosing means taking a very small, sub-perceptual amount of a natural wellness supplement on a regular schedule. You won't feel any strong effect. Instead, many people notice a quiet shift: more clarity, more creativity, a little more ease in the day.
I'm here to guide you through this process personally. This app is an extension of our work together — a daily companion that helps you stay consistent and notice what's changing.
Built differently
Finally, a protocol
built for women.
For most of history, wellness research was conducted on male subjects. Dosing protocols, supplement schedules, clinical trials — all designed around male biology, then applied to everyone.
This app is different. Alongside standard protocols, we offer a cycle-synced programme built around the four phases of the female cycle — adjusting your dose, your stack, and your daily check-ins with your biology, not against it.
Fadiman · 1 on, 2 off
Stamets · 4 on, 3 off
✦ Cycle-synced · women only
How this app works
Your 30 days,
mapped out.
Each day you'll open the app and log a few simple things: whether you dosed, how you're feeling, and any notes. Over 30 days, patterns emerge — and that's where the real insight lives.
Daily check-ins
Mood tracking
30-day calendar
Insights
It only takes about a minute a day. The more consistently you log, the clearer the picture — for both of us.
Exclusive to this app
How do you
identify?

Female users unlock our cycle-synced protocol — the only microdosing programme built around the menstrual cycle. Your dose, your stack, and your daily check-ins adapt across all four phases.

Prefer not to say — continue
Women's protocol
Your cycle is
not a complication.
It's a map.

Every phase of your cycle creates a different hormonal environment. Your brain responds differently. Your energy responds differently. So your protocol should too.
